body: ## [2.2.4](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.2.3...v2.2.4) (2017-11-13) ### Bug Fixes * **numericSelector:** make default value possible ([#2565](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2565)) ([5664f98](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/5664f98))
